upgrade.title: Upgrade your membership?
upgrade.description: Your current plan will be upgraded to {{planName}} once you confirm.

disabled.title: Downgrade not allowed
disabled.description: You can't switch to a lower-tier plan while your current membership is active.

locked.title: Use your remaining sessions first
locked.description: You still have sessions left on your current plan. Use them before upgrading.

hidden.title: You already have an active membership
hidden.description: You're currently subscribed through the web. Manage your membership from there.
